instructions: Follow REVIEW.md and AGENTS.md at the repo root. P0: flag any logging, printing, f-string, or exception text that could leak a password, session cookie (d2lSecureSessionVal/d2lSessionVal/d2lSameSiteCanaryA/B), TOTP/OTP code, or SAML token; credentials must flow only through CredentialStore (Fernet + keyring). P0: when --json is passed, stdout must be valid JSON only; all prompts, banners, logs, and input() prompts must go to sys.stderr. P1: SMS/WhatsApp codes are server-sent on BeginAuth so a literal --totp cannot match (use auth login then auth verify), while offline Authenticator PhoneAppOTP codes are valid pre-provided; resume a pending MFA session only when its saved method matches. P1: require `from __future__ import annotations`, X | None (not Optional), and no bare Callable; wrap subprocess/Playwright/CDP failures into clean errors. Do NOT flag passing --totp for --mfa-method app, or dict[str, Any] for raw D2L REST JSON at the API boundary.
